creator: chris@holly.dyndns.org
text:
The version of patch in /usr/src/gnu is out of date.

Fix: 

I've modified the latest distribution of patch to run on FreeBSD smoothly,
and I've removed a bit of the "extra junk" inherent to GNU software ;)

I have a tarball at http://www.calldei.com/~phoenix/patch.tar.gz if you want
to use that as the next version.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Run patch! ;)
